name: agience-server-astra
description: Captures and prepares incoming information through ingestion, validation, normalization, indexing, hygiene, and telemetry collection.

tools.name: ingest_file
tools.description: Create a workspace artifact from a file URL or raw text

tools.name: document_text_extract
tools.description: Extract text from a PDF artifact into a derived text artifact

tools.name: validate_input
tools.description: Validate incoming data against schema or rules

tools.name: normalize_artifact
tools.description: Normalize artifact content (standardize fields, clean formatting)

tools.name: connect_source
tools.description: Register an external connector (Drive, Gmail, Slack)

tools.name: sync_source
tools.description: Pull latest from a registered connector

tools.name: index_artifact
tools.description: Force re-index of an artifact into the search layer

tools.name: list_streams
tools.description: List active and recent live stream sessions

tools.name: collect_telemetry
tools.description: Collect and record system activity telemetry

tools.name: rotate_stream_key
tools.description: Generate or rotate the RTMP stream key for a stream source artifact

tools.name: get_stream_sessions
tools.description: Get active live sessions for a stream source artifact

AGIENCE_API_URI.description: Base URI of the agience-core backend

MCP_PORT.description: HTTP port for the MCP server

SRS_HTTP_API.description: SRS HTTP API base URL (e.g. http://srs:1985)

STREAM_INGEST_URL.description: Public RTMP ingest URL for OBS clients (e.g. rtmp://rtmp.example.com/live)
